data.settleTest: NVIDIA's own published AC Power Reference Architecture for the DGX SuperPOD B300 (dated 2025-10-30) specifies 432 DGX rPDU + 96 management PDUs per pod — a purchasable/inspectable BOM that settles whether dense AI racks consume PDUs today. This is a document that exists now, not a future market outcome.

proposedCorrection.rationale: NVIDIA's flagship B300 reference architecture ships heavy per-rack PDU content (432 rPDU + 96 mgmt PDUs per pod) as a first-class AC variant, so the 'GPU pods skip PDUs' doubt is correctly refuted and the 0.29 value with 0.24 downside band already covers dense busbar deployments — no change warranted.

researchQueries.query: NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD B300 AC Power Reference Architecture rack PDU count per pod (Raritan PX3-5091R) 2025-2026 BOM
Enterprise on-premise AI GPU pod deployments 2026 using DC busbar power shelves with zero or minimal rack PDUs (GB200 NVL72 install BOMs)
